mnemonics.title: RL Framework Components
mnemonics.content: **AERSPOV**: Agent, Environment, Reward, State, Policy, Value function. Remember: An Agent Encounters Rewards By Selecting Optimal Values.

mnemonics.title: Three ML Paradigms
mnemonics.content: **SUP**: Supervised (labeled), Unsupervised (no labels), Probabilistic (wait, that's not right). Instead: **S-U-R** = Supervised-Unsupervised-Reinforcement. Think: 'Super Users Really Learn' - Super indicates labeled data, Users discover patterns, Really learn through interaction.

mnemonics.title: RL vs Supervised vs Unsupervised
mnemonics.content: **SED**: Supervised = Explicit Direct feedback | **SAD**: Supervised = All Decisions independent | **RLE**: RL = Exploration-Exploitation trade-off | Think: 'SED SAD RLE' to remember key differences.

mnemonics.title: When to Use RL
mnemonics.content: **DASES**: Delayed rewards, Adaptive/Sequential decisions, No labeled data, Exploration needed, Simulation available. Remember: 'Delayed Actions Require SEarching' - D(elayed) A(ctions) R(equire) S(earching).
